UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the Katatib platform (either a traveler, center host, or administrator)

displayName.description: The display name of the user

email.description: The verified email of the user

TahfidCenter.title: TahfidCenter
TahfidCenter.description: Represents a local Quran memorization circle or center welcoming travelers

name.description: Name of the Tahfid center / circle

description.description: Detailed description of the circle, teachers, and environment

dropInWelcomed.description: Highlights whether they accept temporary drop-in visitors without formal paperwork

ageGroups.description: List of age groups welcomed, e.g. children, youth, adults

languages.description: List of spoken languages, e.g. English, Arabic, Turkish

recitationStyles.description: List of recitation Qira'at styles, e.g. Hafs, Warsh, Qalun

teacherName.description: Name of the Sheikh or teacher leading the circle

reviewsCount.description: Total number of reviews written for this center

createdBy.description: UID of the host who listed this center

isApproved.description: Whether the center has been accepted/approved by an admin

noQuranHifz.description: Indicates if the center does not require/offer full Quran Hifz (memorization)

offersCourses.description: Indicates if the center offers academic courses, classes, or seminars

Review.title: Review
Review.description: A review written by a traveler vouching for how accommodating a center is

centerId.description: The center this review belongs to

travelerOrigin.description: Home town of the traveling reviewer (e.g., London, UK)

welcomingScore.description: How welcoming the center was to foreigners, from 1 to 5

user_profiles/{userId}.description: User profile collection containing system roles and registration times

tahfid_centers/{centerId}.description: Quran memorization centers listed by hosts or imported

tahfid_centers/{centerId}/reviews/{revie.description: Reviews and traveler feedback for a specific Tahfid center
